prompt: A photorealistic meme-style outdoor close-up of three tech CEOs standing together in a subtly tense but friendly composition. On the left foreground is Sam Altman, shown from the chest up, with short dark wavy hair, pale skin, a dark crewneck shirt, and an exaggerated smug, amused expression with raised eyebrows and a crooked smile, looking toward the man on the right. In the center background is Satya Nadella, bald, wearing black rectangular glasses and a dark jacket, calmly smiling and looking at the man on the right. On the right foreground is Elon Musk, seen mostly from the back and side profile, wearing a black leather jacket, with the center figure’s hand resting on his shoulder in a familiar, slightly possessive gesture. Use shallow depth of field, natural overcast daylight, blurred trees in the background, and a candid press-photo realism. Add exactly 3 bold white labels with thick black outline placed near each person: "Sam Altman" near the left figure, "Satya Nadella" above the center figure, and "Elon Musk" near the right figure. The overall mood should feel like an industry-insider meme, with subtle social dynamics and ironic facial expressions.
